rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories Set No. One
rulings.Rulings: Michael Glassman's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Interrogatories is denied. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must notify the Court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. on 11/9/11.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: THE JAMES B. MCCLATCHY TRUST DATED NOVEMBER 15, 1974
rulings.Rulings: Sustained with leave to amend to correct the issue concerning notice. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must notify the Court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. on 11/9/11.
